Action.SeeNextNth: 🦘 No partially completed triumphs. Choose an objective and get started!

Activity.BookmarksSync: 🦘 Sync bookmarks between devices with Voluspa.

AllCharacters.Name: 🦘 All Characters
AllCharacters.Description: 🦘 Display activity from all characters combined.

Activity.SelectModeInfo: Para detalhar uma atividade específica, selecione um modo na interface acima
Activity.SelectDateFromGraph: Selecione uma data com atividades jogadas a partir do gráfico acima.

Prepare-se: quanto mais atividades você jogar e quanto mais longe você saltar, mais tempo isso levará!

A API da Bungie não permite a solicitação de histórico de atividades de um período específico, então estamos fazendo este trabalho.

Você ainda não adicionou nenhum favorito ainda!

Você pode habilitar a sincronização dos favoritos ao ativar a sincronização em _Configurações_.
State.NoHistoryAvailable: 🦘 Find a fireteam and seek triumph against enemies of the Traveler.
State.PeriodNotFound: O período solicitado não foi encontrado no histórico de atividades deste personagem.

ErrorBoundary.NextSteps: 🦘 Braytech has encountered an error. Try whatever it is you did, again. If that does not resolve your issue, please join the [Discord](https://discord.bray.tech) for further assistance. Take a screenshot of this and share it in the #problems channel.
ErrorBoundary.NextStepsApp: 🦘 Braytech has encountered a fatal error. If one of the available actions does not resolve your issue, please join the [Discord](https://discord.bray.tech) for further assistance. Take a screenshot of this and share it in the #problems channel.

FriendlyError.Description: Por favor, não conte ao Comandante Zavala... Ainda.
FriendlyError.Name: Não Repare na Bagunça

NetworkError.Description: Um erro de conexão aconteceu. Este é um erro temporário que pode ser resolvido ao reiniciar ou sair da página.
NetworkError.Name: Erro de conexão

ServiceWorkerInstalling.Description: Uma atualização do app está sendo instalada em segundo plano.

ServiceWorkerReload.Description:
Uma nova atualização para Braytech está disponível. Por favor, selecione recarregar para usar ume melhor versão deste app.

Veja a Lista de Mudanças na página inicial para mais detalhes no que há de novo.
ServiceWorkerReload.Name: Atualização Diponível

UnsupportedBrowser.Description:
Braytech requer funções de um navegador mais atual para operar. Os requisitos mínimos do navegador são definidos para permitir que navegadores com mais de um ano executem o Braytech. Por isso, se você encontrar esta mensagem, é hora de se mudar para algo novo.

Um navegador baseado em Chromium como o Microsoft Edge é recomendado.@className=warning@
UnsupportedBrowser.Name: Navegador não Suportado

AuthReset.Description:
🦘 While updating authentication data, Bungie returned an unexpected error. As a result, your authentication data has been reset.

Please visit **Settings** to re-authenticate with Bungie.net at your convenience.
AuthReset.Name: 🦘 Authentication Reset

App.Updated: 🦘 Braytech was just updated to the latest vesion! Check out the change log for details. Tap this to take a look!
App.TemporaryError: Ocorreu um erro temporário da Bungie.
App.MemberServiceInactive:
🦘 Due to inactivity, background refresh of your profile data has paused.

Interacting with the app will reactivate the service.
App.WindowSize: 🦘 This experience works best in a larger window. Make it bigger, honey.
App.APIIssue: 🦘 A known [Bungie API issue]({{url}}) is prevents Braytech from displaying this correctly at this time.

Auth.DeleteAuth: 🦘 Delete the authentication data stored on your device. While unnecessary, this function is provided for your peace of mind.
Auth.SuggestionShort: 🦘 Authenticate with Bungie.net to load your profile and unlock tonnes of features.
Auth.SuggestionLong: 🦘 Most of Braytech's features are available to all users and depend on publically available data, but some of Destiny's features require more explicit access permissions which you can grant to Braytech by authenticating with Bungie.net.
Auth.MembershipsInfo: 🦘 These are the memberships that are currently associated with your Bungie.net profile.

Friends.Text: 🦘 Authenticate with Bungie.net to see your Bungie friends list here! It's a handy shortcut to see who's on and to check each other's profiles!

Dresstiny.Text: 🦘 Authenticate with Bungie.net to create and manage your Dresstiny fits!

Auth.SubscriptionFeature: 🦘 This is a subscription feature. Some features are made possible only with subscriber support. [Learn more](/settings/subscriptions)

NoAuth.Description: Para usar essa funcionalidade, diga a Bungie que você aprova. Nenhuma informação pressoal é compartilhada fazendo isso—apenas um código de autenticação que permite interagir com mais endpoints da API.
NoAuth.Name: Autenticação necessária

DiffProfile.Description:
Você não tem permissão para acessar dados de perfil de um usuário diferente, mas você pode usar estes links auxiliares para retornar para o seu perfil.

Você pode encontrar mais informação sobre sua autenticação na página de _Configurações_.
DiffProfile.Name: ahh, meu bem... Meu beeeeeem

Character.Auth: 🦘 [Authenticate with Bungie.net]({{url}}) to manage your equipment.
Character.DiffProfile: 🦘 You're viewing someone else's profile. You can look but if you try to push buttons, don't expect results!
Character.WorldDropsNeeded: 🦘 Seek out world drops until you've reached **{{light}}** to avoid wasting drops with greater potential.
Character.PowerfulDropsNeeded: 🦘 Engage with activities which reward Powerful Gear to reach **{{light}}**.
Character.PinnacleDropsNeeded: 🦘 You're on the Pinnacle Gear grind. Attain **{{light}}** by completing the most challenging activities.

ClanBannerBuilder.Description: Colabore com membros do clã em um novo banner do clã. Selecionar uma opção diferente instantaneamente atualiza a URL da página, o que permite a você compartilhar facilmente suas customizações.
ClanBannerBuilder.Name: Construtor de Banner de Clã

WorldDrops.Description: 🦘 Display weapon world drops. There's a lot of them so they're hidden by default to improve rendering performance.
WorldDrops.Name: 🦘 Weapon World Drops

ArmorTitan.Description: 🦘 Display Titan armor. Thick, strong stuff.
ArmorTitan.Name: 🦘 Titan Armor

ArmorWarlock.Description: 🦘 Display Warlock armor. The best and most useful class.
ArmorWarlock.Name: 🦘 Warlock Hunter

NoClan.Description:
Clãs são um grupo de amigos que eleva sua experiência de jogo online. Combine com seus companheiros de clã para participar de desaios cooperativos ou veja-os em suas atividades sozinhos e receba prêmios extras.

Entre no clã de seus amigos, faça novos amigos, ou crie seu próprio clã no aplicativo companion de Destiny ou em [Bungie.net](https://bungie.net/).
NoClan.Name: Sem afiliação de clã

Clan.Progression: 🦘 As your clan levels up, clan banner perks are unlocked for all members. Complete activities throughout the system to increase your clan's level.
Clan.RitualRewards: 🦘 As a clan, complete ritual activities to unlock engrams from Suraya Hawthorne for all members.

Relationships.DetailsGraph: 🦘 Displaying player activity history by date, with and without clan members.
Relationships.DetailsTable: 🦘 Displaying clan members this player has played with, by aggregating their activity reports and cross-referencing activity participants with clan membership. Limited to the current season for expediency.
Relationships.NoEncounters: 🦘 This player hasn't shared any activities during the selected time frame.
Relationships.NoFriends: Você não está sozinho-você fará um amigo eventualmente... Convide um amigo do clã para algumas atividades!
Relationships.NoParters: Ninguém falou que namorar era fácil. De volta a luta, Guardião!
Relationships.SocialButterfly: 🦘 You get around! You've played with everyone this season.

LimitCurrentSeason.Description: 🦘 Only load activities from the current season.
LimitCurrentSeason.Name: 🦘 Current Season

LimitGroupMembers.Description: 🦘 Filter encounters and fireteams to only include members of your clan.
LimitGroupMembers.Name: 🦘 Clan Members

LimitBungieFriends.Description: 🦘 Filter encounters and fireteams to only include Bungie friends.
LimitBungieFriends.Name: 🦘 Bungie Friends

Collections.EververseGambling: 🦘 Successful projections depend on pattern-matching (if there even is one) and manifest content. If a projection isn't visible, it's not available.

CreateFit.Name: 🦘 Create
CreateFit.Description: 🦘 Create a new fit based on your equipment or fantasy.

AlterFit.Name: 🦘 Alter

Loadout.Info: 🦘 Adjust your equipment in game before creating a fit. It may take some time for the API to reflect your changes.

Name.Info: 🦘 An original name befitting your unmatched beauty, cutesieness, and machismo.

Description.Info: 🦘 Descriptions are optional and should be 256 characters or fewer.

Screenshot.Info: 🦘 Screenshots should be captured from the "Customize Appearance" screen in-game. Screenshots must be captured at 16:9, 21:9, or 32:9 aspect ratios (i.e. 1920 x 1080), be less than 3 megabytes in size, and be in JPEG format. Place your cursor in the bottom middle for best results. Any deviations from these guidelines may result in your fit failing approval.

Url.Info: 🦘 Include a link to your Reddit r/DestinyFashion post.

Total.Info: 🦘 The length of this zesty lookbook.

Likes.Info: 🦘 The number of times the fits have been "checked." The passion of the people is fervorous.

Members.Info: 🦘 The force behind this whirlwind of trendsetting fashion. Every one of them, a trendsetter.

ClassDistribution.Info: 🦘 It's a popularity contest–this is how it's won.
ClassDistribution.Name: 🦘 Class Distribution

Header.Description:
Bem vindo ao Braytech! Antes de começar, eu tenho umas dicas para você.

Se você tiver algum feedback ou perguntas, nós podemos conversar no Discord ou você pode checar o FAQ!
Header.Name: Começando

Search.Description:
Precisa encontrar algo rápido? Braytech tem um menu de busca, disponível em qualquer lugar do app.

Aperte  ou clique na lente, e comece a digitar!
Search.Name: Busca

Settings.Description:
Braytech está repleto de configurações, desde temas escuros a opções de visibilidade de itens e a configurações de sincronização.

As _Configurações_ estão no canto superior.
Settings.Name: Configurações

Views.Description: 🦘 See all of Braytech's features at a glance by selecting **** from the top of the app!

Landing.CallToAction: Explore Destiny utilizando o Braytech e obtenha boas vantagens e detalhes sobre suas lutas contra as forças das Trevas

Features.Description:
🦘 Destiny 2 character progression, clans, triumphs, collections, and more. Braytech is a Destiny fan site that allows users to view and map checklists, track and view triumphs, inspect collectibles, and so much more.

Braytech started as a checklist app and has bellowed into a monstrosity of many talents. It's always being refined and expanded.

Need to find something quick? Press  and start typing! Braytech has a search interface, available anywhere in the app.

Braytech is built for desktop users first, but functions as well and looks as beautiful on smaller devices. In fact, there's an [iPhone app](https://apps.apple.com/app/braytech/id1593151816) and an [Android app](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=braytech.org.twa). Want to make a suggestion? Join the [Discord](https://discord.bray.tech)!
Features.Name: 🦘 Braytech

Support.Description:
🦘 Braytech is a full-time job—I design and develop to improve myself and to aid all Guardians. I'm anti-ads, to my own demise. Your support helps me keep the lights on and allows me to do my best work and to make your Destiny experience even better. I hope you love using it as much as I love building it! 💖

Join the [Discord](https://discord.bray.tech) and the other patrons in the Braytech Research Division.
Support.Name: 🦘 Are you a fan? Show your support

Landing.PollsChannel: 🦘 Join the conversation on [Discord](https://discord.bray.tech) and vote on how Braytech can improve.

Blog.Error: Não foi possível carregar as postagens dessa vez.
Blog.Name: Blog

MemberSearch.Name: 🦘 Find Guardian

Comparison.Name: 🦘 Comparison

🦘 Records and collectibles which **{{a}}** has but **{{b}}** doesn't.

This comparison is made from live data and as such may contradict the current leaderboard ranking.

Stats.MinActiveScore: 🦘 Players with at least {{number}} Active Score
Stats.MinCollectionScore: 🦘 Players with at least {{number}} Collections Score

RankedPlayers.Name: 🦘 Ranked players
RankedPlayers.Info: 🦘 Only players who've played Destiny since the latest expansion release are ranked.

RankedDate.Name: 🦘 Ranked date
RankedDate.Info: 🦘 Leaderboards were last generated with fresh data at this time.

Profile.Description: 🦘 What gives you power; through light and dark, do you hold the frontlines as a Titan, disintegrate entire armies from afar as a Warlock, or move cowardly through the shadows as a Hunter?

Medals.Description:
🦘 Recognition

Digital tokens of recognition, medals celebrate various forms of contribution and achievement. Displayed proudly on your profile, they highlight your involvement, support, and accomplishments within the Destiny community.
Medals.Name: 🦘 Medals

Activity.Description:
🦘 A Ghost's Guardian

Your life after your life begins here. You are a risen, chosen by a Ghost, and bestowed with great power through Light and Darkness.

These were your first steps.
Activity.Name: 🦘 First Risen

Dresstiny.Description:
🦘 Fancy pants

Some say you're a leader in fashion, others say you're a trendsetter, but one thing is for sure: you know how to equip items!

This is the true endgame: Dresstiny.
Dresstiny.Name: 🦘 Dresstiny

Highlight.Description:
🦘 Your pride and joy

You've elected to wear this accomplishment on your shoulder, for all around to see.
Highlight.Name: 🦘 Highlight

Ranks.Description:
🦘 Through boldness to the stars

Lead fireteams to victory against minions of the Darkness and compete against one another in the Crucible for accolades from Lord Shaxx himself.
Ranks.Name: 🦘 Guardian Standing

Commonality.Description:
🦘 Triumph and claim your rewards

Earth and worlds beyond touched by the Traveler hold wonderful oddities and sought-after treasures of myth.

The fun is in the chase.
Commonality.Name: 🦘 Rare Treasures & Exotic Style

Titles.Description:
🦘 Emblems of victory

The ultimate measure of a completionist and collector; wear them well.
Titles.Name: 🦘 Triumph Titles

Gambit.Description:
🦘 Infamous

Well, well, well... look who's been stackin' motes and droppin' Blockers like it's target practice. You Guardians are a real storm—Invadin', bankin', clearin' waves like it's child's play.

{{number}} wins, huh? That's somethin' special. You're not just playin' Gambit—you are Gambit. Reckon the Darkness is takin' notes.
Gambit.Name: 🦘 Gambit

Crucible.Description:
🦘 [Incoherent screaming]

YES! This... this is what the Crucible was MADE for! Your Light blazes like a sun, burning through doubt and weakness! I am HONORED to witness such power! Now get back in there—show them what LEGENDS are made of!
Crucible.Name: 🦘 Crucible

AggregateActivityStats.Description:
🦘 Cumulative Experience

Sure, you've annihilated "gods," and in some cases, formed weapons from their remains, but just how many times have you thoughtlessly murdered them...
AggregateActivityStats.Name: 🦘 Aggregate Activity Stats

Share.Description:
🦘 Brag about it

Share a link to your Legend and a unique preview image will be generated for you to share with your friends.

This image is generated from your current profile data and updates regularly; however, some services may cache it for a period of time.
Share.Name: 🦘 Share

Error.Description: Alguma coisa muito inesperada e irrecuperável aconteceu.

BungieError.Description:
Dados cruciais da API não puderam ser carregados no momento. Este é um problema intermitente. Por favor, tente novamente.

Se o erro persistir, a API pode estar sofrendo uma vasta queda ou sua rede local pode estar restringindo requisições à API da Bungie.
BungieError.Name: Erro da Bungie

VoluspaError.Description: 🦘 Braytech couldn't reach the Voluspa network. Please verify your WAN accessibility.
VoluspaError.Name: 🦘 Voluspa Error

IndexedDBError.Description:
🦘 Something went wrong while trying to access browser storage.

If this error occurs again, your browser or device may be incompatible or improperly configured.

IndexedDBErrorFatal.Description:
Alguma coisa deu errado ao tentar acessar o armazenamento do navegador.

Por favor, atualize o app e tente novamente.

IndexedDBOpenFailedError.Description:
Alguma coisa deu errado ao tentar acessar o armazenamento do navegador.

Alguns navegadores desabilitam o acesso ao _Indexed DB_ quando se navega em modo privado.

Por favor, atualize o app e tente novamente.

MaintenanceError.Description:
A API da Bungie esta desativada para manutenção.

Se ligue em @BungieHelp no Twitter para mais informações.
MaintenanceError.Name: Manutenção da Bungie

ManifestDownloadError.Description:
Alguma coisa deu errado ao tentar baixar o manifesto da Bungie.

Por favor, atualize o app e tente novamente.
ManifestDownloadError.Name: Falha ao baixar manifesto

ManifestError.Description:
Alguma coisa deu errado quanto foi tentado atualizar o manifesto.

Por favor, atualize o app e tente novamente.
ManifestError.Name: Erro no Manifesto

NoInternetError.Description: Você está offline? Seu navegador acha que sim...

SettingsFetchError.Description:
Algo deu errado ao tentar coletar a configuração de API da Bungie.

Por favor, recarregue o app e tente novamente.
SettingsFetchError.Name: Falha de configuração

Screenshots.Description:
Capturas de Tela propostas devem obedecer um critério muito estrito:
- Possuir resolução de 1920x1080
- HUD invisível
-Nenhum Guardião ou equipamento visível
- Nenhum inimigo visível
- Configurações de vídeo máximas
  - Incluir uma resolução de renderização de 200%

ExperimentalFeatures.Description: Comece a usar recursos que ainda não foram desenvolvidos, refinados ou verificados adequadamente.

ClearReports.Name: Apagar Relatórios

Usage.Description: Armazenamento usado pelo manifesto de Destiny e relatórios de jogo.
Usage.Name: Uso

AlternateAppIcon.Info: 🦘 Alter the appearance of the app's icon.

FlipSubviewNav.Info: Para usuários que querem ser diferentes e para usuários que usam o Braytech em seu dispositivo móvel com a mão direita.

ItemSize.Info: Ajuste o tamanho dos ícones de itens do inventário para a maioria dos recursos do Braytech.

HideCompletedCollectibles.Description: Se um colecionável for adquirido, ele aparecerá escondido na página de Coleções.
HideCompletedCollectibles.Name: Esconder itens da coleção adquiridos

HideCompletedRecords.Description: Se um triunfo estiver completo e resgatado, ele aparecerá escondido na página de Triunfos.
HideCompletedRecords.Name: Esconder triunfos completos

HideInvisibleCollectibles.Description: Se o jogo especificar que você não tem permissão para ver um colecionável específico, ele aparecerá escondido na página de Coleções.
HideInvisibleCollectibles.Name: Esconder itens invisíveis da coleção

HideInvisibleRecords.Description: Se o registro de um triunfo for secreto, será mostrado como tal na página de Triunfos.
HideInvisibleRecords.Name: Esconder triunfos invisíveis

HideUnobtainableRecords.Description: Esconder registros não obtíveis das páginas
HideUnobtainableRecords.Name: Esconder triunfos não mais obtíveis

ResetEverything.Description: Resetar todas as suas configurações, dados salvos e histórico
ResetEverything.Name: Resetar Tudo

ResetNotifications.Description: Resetar notificações dispensadas para o estado padrão
ResetNotifications.Name: Resetar notificações

ResetProfileHistory.Description: Deleta a lista salva dos perfis previamente procurados (Seletor de personagem)
ResetProfileHistory.Name: Resetar histórico de perfil

ResetTips.Description: Retornar dicas informacionais para seu estado padrão
ResetTips.Name: Resetar dicas

ResetTrackedTriumphs.Description: Deixar de seguir todos os triunfos seguidos pelo usuário. Não afetará o estados dos triunfos seguidos dentro do jogo.
ResetTrackedTriumphs.Name: Resetar triunfos seguidos

Colloquial.Description: Ative gírias fornecidas pelos usuários no lugar de textos oficiais.
Colloquial.Name: Usar linguagem coloquial

Checklists.Info: Alternar a visibilidade das Checklists. Mantenha-a limpa.

Developer.Info: Ferramentas para ajudar desenvolvedores quando trabalharem no _Mapas_

HideDiscoveredNodes.Description: Se um ponto foi descoberto, omita-o do mapa, a menos que ele seja selecionado.
HideDiscoveredNodes.Name: Ocultar Pontos Encontrados

HidePatrols.Description: Ocultar Todos os Marcadores de Patrulha.
HidePatrols.Name: Ocultar Patrulhas

Atmosphere.Description: Exibir o clima, como cobertura de nuvens.
Atmosphere.Name: Atmosfera

VisualFidelity.Info: Altere o número de enfeites visuais

Profile.Info: O Braytech facilita a visualização de vários perfis de jogadores ao mesmo tempo, mas lembra o último perfil que você selecionou [Profile Search](/profile-search).

PushNotifications.Info:
As notificações push usam as APIs do navegador e do sistema operacional para enviar notificações mesmo quando você não estiver usando o aplicativo.

Se quiser que o Braytech envie notificações, aqui você pode configurar os eventos e a frequencia para que elas sejam exibidas.
PushNotifications.Incompatible: Seu navegador ainda não suporta notificações push.
PushNotifications.NoServiceWorker: 🦘 A service worker hasn't been installed yet. Try reloading Braytech.
PushNotifications.PermissionDenied: Seu navegador diz que você negou a permissão de notificações. Você precisará habilitá-la ou redefini-la manualmente antes que possamos continuar.
PushNotifications.ServiceWorkerInstalling: 🦘 A service worker is installing. Please wait.
PushNotifications.Stats: 🦘 **{{subscriptions}}** subscribed devices by **{{subscribers}}** users, of which **{{subscribed}}** support Braytech with a subscription.

ReloadRequired.Description: 🦘 Select reload app to activate your changes immediately.
ReloadRequired.Name: 🦘 Reload Required

Reports.Info: Assim que baixado, os relatórios são salvos no dispositivos para um rápido acesso posterior. Todos os relatórios são associados ao membro por meio do qual foram originalmente vistos. Você pode limpar eles aqui, membro por membro. Você pode querer fazer isso para minimizar o tempo de carregamento inicial, se você baixou muitos relatórios.
Reports.NoReports: Nenhum registro está armazenado no dispositivo.

HideFeatureSuggestions.Description: 🦘 Hold your breath–I know what I'm doing.
HideFeatureSuggestions.Name: 🦘 Hide Feature Suggestions

ItemVisibilityOverride.Description: 🦘 Use this setting to override global Item Visibility settings for records and collectibles.
ItemVisibilityOverride.Name: 🦘 Show Completed and Acquired

Subscriptions.Info:
🦘 Ads suck so Braytech doesn't use them, but none of this is free or easy!

In place of ads, I depend on your generosity. Your support helps keep the app online, enables me to work on new features, and pays my rent!

Subscribe at one of the following tiers for cool rewards such as profile medals!
Subscriptions.Help: 🦘 You can get help with this at any time by jumping on [Discord](https://discord.bray.tech) or by emailing [subscriptions@bray.tech](mailto:subscriptions@bray.tech).
Subscriptions.HelpMore:
🦘 Subscription tier pricing is displayed in USD. Changing tiers is achieved by resubscribing at a different tier.

You can get help with this at any time by jumping on [Discord](https://discord.bray.tech) or by emailing [subscriptions@bray.tech](mailto:subscriptions@bray.tech).
Subscriptions.AuthRequired: 🦘 Authenticate with Bungie.net to create or manage a subscription.

State.Ending: 🦘 You subscribed on **{{created}}** and your subscription will **end** on **{{currentPeriodEnd}}**.
State.Renewing: 🦘 You subscribed on **{{created}}** and your subscription will **renew** on **{{currentPeriodEnd}}**.
State.Cancelled: 🦘 Your subscrition **ended** on **{{currentPeriodEnd}}**. Thank you for your support!

DiscordProfile.Disconnected: 🦘 Get your server perks, be eligble to receive rewards such as emblem codes, and participate in the conversation to help shape Braytech's development!

Subscriptions.Stripe: 🦘 Visit Stripe to manage your subscription.

Newsletter.Name: 🦘 Receive Email
Newsletter.Description: 🦘 Get Braytech's blog posts and any relevant subscriber information delivered directly to your inbox.

ChangeTier.Name: 🦘 Change Tier
ChangeTier.Description:
🦘 Changing tiers is fast and easy. All you need to do is confirm. You will be billed immediately.

As always, if you have any issues or want to chat, please don't hesistate–hit me up at [subscriptions@bray.tech](mailto:subscriptions@bray.tech) or @ me on [Discord](https://discord.bray.tech).

Subscriptions.BlogInfo: 🦘 Keep track of Braytech's development by following along with the latest blog posts. I try to keep these as interesting and insightful as I can!
Subscriptions.DiscordInfo: 🦘 Join the Braytech community! Hang out, drop suggestions, report bugs, and get help for the app instantly.
Subscriptions.NewSubsInfo: 🦘 Recent subscribers who carry Braytech on their shoulders, enabling its continuous development.
Subscriptions.OneTime: 🦘 Make a one-time donation to support Braytech. No strings attached, but I will take you out for a drink.

Username.Description:
🦘 Shorten your address from a bunch of long numbers to something superior.

Choose a unique name or match your Bungie name, it's up to you. This is just another cute way to distinguish yourself from other players and it makes it easier to go straight to your profile on a device you haven't used.

Emoji supported **🐸**
Username.Name: 🦘 Username

Highlight.Description:
🦘 Choose to highlight a special triumph or an impressive stat tracker.

This highlight is displayed on your [Legend](/legend) view and in images generated for links you share around the internet.
Highlight.Name: 🦘 Highlight

EmblemCodes.Description:
🦘 Braytech has amassed a grand collection of emblem codes, sometimes contributed to by its most benevolent users.

As a subscriber, you may redeem an emblem code from [The Developer's Stash]({{url}}).
EmblemCodes.Name: 🦘 Emblem Codes

AdvancedLeaderboards.Description:
🦘 If you're a [Leaderboards](/leaderboards) power user, you've got two more tools in your inventory.

As a subscriber, you can compare the difference between two adjacent players on a leaderboard, and you have option to update your profile's Leaderboards data and reassess all leaderboards on demand.
AdvancedLeaderboards.Name: 🦘 Advanced Leaderboards

Medal.Description: 🦘 High tier subscribers unlock a permanent medal for their profiles, displayed wherever their profile appears, both on roster entries and in player details dialogs.
Medal.Name: 🦘 Medals

PriorityDevelopment.Description:
🦘 Braytech is only as great as its usefulness to its users. I, the developer, have always taken feedback and suggestions from users.

Users have made Braytech greater, and I'll prioritse your feedback and suggesstions.
PriorityDevelopment.Name: 🦘 Priority Development

Newsletter.Description: 🦘 Subscribe to Braytech's newsletter to receive blog posts and more directly to your email inbox. It's an old Cryptarch technology, but it's functional.
Newsletter.Name: 🦘 Newsletter

BraytechLegend.Info:
🦘 Brandish your profile with a unique username to make sharing easier, select a triumph or tracker to highlight when your profile is shared, and choose a character to default to when a link to your profile is shared without a character specified.

[Subscribers](/settings/subscriptions) get many perks including the ability to grab a custom username.
BraytechLegend.AuthRequired: 🦘 To alter your legend, you need to first authenticate Braytech with Bungie.net.
BraytechLegend.SubscriptionRequired: 🦘 To claim a username and other cool tricks, you need to be a subscriber. [Support Braytech](/settings/subscriptions) through a subscription.
BraytechLegend.Username:
🦘 Select a unique username or fallback to your Bungie name. You can change this at any time.

A branding specialist is available upon request for a modest fee.
BraytechLegend.UsernameSpecifications: 🦘 Maximum length for usernames is 127 characters. Any word character (equivalent to [a-zA-Z0-9_]) and some emoji are supported.
BraytechLegend.DefaultCharacter:
🦘 You can choose a character to be a default for links shared without a character identifier.

For example, if you share a link to https://bray.tech/@/{{username}}, Braytech will ask the viewer to select a character. You can select a preferred character instead.
BraytechLegend.ShareHighlight: 🦘 When your profile is shared, an image specific to you is generated. You can choose to highlight a triumph or tracker you're proud of. This will also be displayed on the [Legend](/legend) view.

DeleteSyncedSettings.Description: Desabilitar sincronização e apagar os dados armazenados com Voluspa.
DeleteSyncedSettings.Name: Excluir informações sincronizadas

DownloadSyncedSettings.Description: Baixar dados sincronizados imediatamente, sobreescrevendo as configurações atuais.
DownloadSyncedSettings.Name: Baixar dados sincronizados

Enable.Description: Habilitar sincronização e constante sincronização com Voluspa

Sync.Info: Sincronize suas configurações para a visibilidade de itens, mapas, triunfos seguidos e histórico de procura de perfis.
Sync.RequirementsNotMet: 🦘 Synchronisation requires that you first authenticate Braytech with Bungie.net.

PromptForMinorVersions.Description: 🦘 Notify me to update even for minor versions.
PromptForMinorVersions.Name: 🦘 Minor Version Updates

ReloadAppAutomatically.Description: Quando uma atualização para Braytech estiver disponível, recarregue o aplicativo automaticamente, independentemente do que você esteja fazendo.
ReloadAppAutomatically.Name: Recarregar App automaticamente

SystemPreference.Name: 🦘 Match System
SystemPreference.Description: Em dispositivos que permitem, Braytech copiará as preferências de tema do seu sistema.

DumpServiceWorker.Description: Tentar desregistrar o service worker instalado. Se obtiver sucesso, recarregar o app permitirá que um novo service worker tome o seu lugar.
DumpServiceWorker.Name: Remover Service Worker

UpdateServiceWorker.Description: Tentar atualizar o Service Worker imediatamente. Essa função desabilitará o botão temporariamente. Você poderá continuar usando o Braytech enquanto isso tenta atualizar em segundo plano. Se obtiver êxito, você será pedido para reiniciar o app.
UpdateServiceWorker.Name: Atualizar Service Worker

Gay.Description: Deixe tudo Gay. Ilumine sua vida com essa inovação tecnológica fabulosa, limitada, chocante, e exclusiva do Braytech®!
Gay.Name: Habilitar ✨

Grinch.Description: 🦘 You are the Grinch who stole Christmas.
Grinch.Name: 🦘 Grinch 🚫🎄

ReducedMotion.Description: Reduz animações da interface de usuário. Reduz o uso de CPU do seu dispositivo.
ReducedMotion.Name: Reduzir Movimentação

Delete.Failure: Suas configurações não puderam ser excluídas dessa vez. Essa é uma falha temporária.
Delete.Success: Suas configurações foram excluídas. Sincronização foi desativada.

Merge.Failure: Um erro ocorreu durante a mescalgem das suas configurações. Essa é uma falha temporária.

Sync.Failure: Um erro ocorreu durante a sincronização das suas configurações. Essa é uma falha temporária.

Triumphs.NonePartiallyComplete: 🦘 No partially completed triumphs. Choose an objective and get started!
Triumphs.NearLimit: 🦘 Display is limited to {{number}} triumphs for performance reasons.

Classified.Description: Este registro está escondido e pode ser revelado futuramente.
Classified.Name: Registro secreto

Details.NoClanOrFireteam: Entre em um esquadrão ou clã para ver como os seus colegas Guardiões se comportam ao seu lado!
Details.LoadBungieFriends: 🦘 Would you like to display your Bungie friends? This will take a few seconds.
Details.HasItem: 🦘 This record is related to an item. You can view this item's [details]({{string}}).

Record.Commonality: Porcentagem de jogadores que são indexados por Voluspa que resgataram este registro.
Record.Expiration: Este registro pode não ser mais obtido assim que expirar.
Record.ScoreProgress: 🦘 The score value earned for this triumph.

Triumphs.BraytechActiveScore: 🦘 Your active triumph score is **{{number}}**, as determined by Braytech. This value is calculated by examining available triumphs.
Triumphs.BraytechLegacyScore: 🦘 Your legacy triumph score is **{{number}}**, as determined by Braytech. This value is calculated by examining available triumphs with current API data.
Triumphs.BungieScore: 🦘 According to Bungie, your score is **{{number}}**. This may be inaccurate as it may not consider some triumphs which have since been removed or had their score values altered.
Triumphs.PotentialUnattainedScore: 🦘 The Guardian has **{{number}}** score waiting to be to unlocked.
Triumphs.RecordsRedeemed: 🦘 You have redeemed all of these records and chosen to hide them.
Triumphs.RecordsUnavailable: 🦘 There are no records available for display.
Triumphs.Title: 🦘 Title

Titles.CanBeGilded: 🦘 This Title can be gilded. Gilded Titles demonstrate unprecedented skill and achievement but reset each Season.

Commonality.Description: 🦘 Percentage of players who are crawled and assessed by Voluspa who've acquired this title.
Commonality.Name: 🦘 Title Commonality

CommonalityGilded.Description: 🦘 Percentage of players who are crawled and assessed by Voluspa who've acquired and gilded this title.
CommonalityGilded.Name: 🦘 Gilded Title Commonality

Secret.Name: Triunfo Secreto
Secret.Description: Um misterio que você ainda não descobriu.

GrantsScore.Name: 🦘 Grants Score
GrantsScore.Description: 🦘 Only display records which grant triumph score upon completion.

MatchClass.Name: 🦘 Match Class
MatchClass.Description: 🦘 Only display class-related triumphs which match the selected character's class.

Flatten.Name: 🦘 Flatten
Flatten.Description: 🦘 Use a flat list for display rather than a tree-style view.

HideCompletedAll.Name: 🦘 Hide Completed
HideCompletedAll.Description: 🦘 Hide all triumphs which are completed by all selected members.

ExpandAll.Name: 🦘 Expand All
ExpandAll.Description: 🦘 Expand all nodes so that you may be overwhelmed in the grandeur of your tasks.

CollapseAll.Name: 🦘 Collapse All
CollapseAll.Description: 🦘 Collapse all nodes so that you may explore at your own leisure.

RootNode.Name: 🦘 Root Node
RootNode.Description: 🦘 Select a root node to explore.

Triumphs.NoTrackedRecords: Você não está seguindo nada no momento!
Triumphs.NoHiddenRecords:
🦘 You aren't hiding any triumphs yet!

You can sync your triumphs by enabling sync in [Settings](/settings).
Triumphs.TrackedSync: 🦘 Sync tracked triumphs between devices with Voluspa.
Triumphs.PinPresentationNodes: 🦘 Right click a presentation node to pin it to the top of the list.

Subscriptions.Info:
🦘 Ads suck so Braytech doesn't use them, but building Braytech costs time.

In place of ads, Braytech depends on your generosity. Your support helps keep the app online, enables work on new features, and keeps the developer alive and housed!

CostsCovered.Name: 🦘 Costs Covered
CostsCovered.Description: 🦘 Progress made towards covering this month's server and dev cost.

Subscriptions.RewardSeraph: 🦘 Unlock the **Seraph** medal, a symbol of dedication and commitment to protecting the Warmind and its assets, and bettering humankind.
Subscriptions.RewardSubmind: 🦘 Submind tier patrons unlock this animated Warmind ultra medal.
Subscriptions.Rewards: 🦘 Unlock unique profile medals when you subscribe to Braytech's Patreon.
Subscriptions.Leaderboards: 🦘 Leaderboards are a lot of work, which while thought-provoking, is particularly costly. I had to buy Databases for Dummies and everything. If you like collecting things, maybe I could [interest you in unlocking some a rare medal](https://www.patreon.com/braytech) for your Braytech profile?
Subscriptions.MemberLinkExample:
🦘 This could be _you_, with a cool little medal on your member link to demonstrate your support for Braytech and its development.

_Braytech and its subsidiaries do not endorse the actions of Clovis Bray I or their variants._
Subscriptions.UpsellInfo: 🦘 Your support helps keep the app online, enables work on new features, and keeps the developer alive!

FailureStrings.UniquenessViolation: Só pode possuir um por vez

AdjustGraph.Description:
🦘 View this data in a different manner by selecting an alternate type of graph.

_Voluspa_ collects data from {{crawled}} players. Of those players, {{assessed}} were successfully assessed for the purpose of providing this data. Of {{assessed}} assessed players, {{frequency}} have discovered this collectible.
AdjustGraph.Description_record:
🦘 View this data in a different manner by selecting an alternate type of graph.

_Voluspa_ collects data from {{crawled}} players. Of those players, {{assessed}} were successfully assessed for the purpose of providing this data. Of {{assessed}} assessed players, {{frequency}} have completed this record.
AdjustGraph.Name: 🦘 Adjust Graph

Voluspa.Assessed: 🦘 {{number}} players are currently assessed by Voluspa.
